channel.title: Discipleship on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Discipleship on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Building the City
item.description:
I want to take the time to write a full blueprint later.
But now, I leave you with these precepts:

The Foundation:

  • Believe in Jesus Christ as your Salvation
  • Learn how to be led by the Holy Spirit
  • Read through the canon, Holy Bible, multiple times
  • Converse with the Father as His child

The Principal Virtues:

  • Love
  • Faith
  • Wisdom

The Pillars of Growth:

  • Food & Drink (“Bread & Water/ Milk/ Wine, " which is the word of God)
  • Exercise (Prayer, Obedience, Walking by Faith)
  • Rest (confidence in GOD)

The Definition of Kingdom-Life

“Trust and Obey”
